metadata.task_title: SimpliSalonCloud Client Management and CRM Features Testing

content.text: Log in to SimpliSalonCloud at https://simplisaloncloud.vercel.app/login with email 'bartosz.rogala@yahoo.pl' and password 'Tmp!rTC8-OLa'. Navigate to 'Klienci' (Clients) in the sidebar. Verify the client list loads. Click the button to add a new client. Fill in the form with: full name (minimum 2 characters), phone number (9+ digits), email, and optional notes. Save the client and verify it appears in the list. Then click on the client row to see details. Try the 'Quick Send' feature - click the message icon next to a client, select a template from the dropdown, and verify the send dialog works. Navigate to the CRM sub-sections: 'Kampanie' (Campaigns), 'Automatyzacje' (Automations), 'Wiadomosci' (Messages), and 'Szablony' (Templates). Verify each section loads without errors. Check that all UI labels are in Polish and there are no raw English strings or technical variable names visible. Try editing an existing client and then deleting a client. Report any validation errors, missing translations, or broken features.

Understood! I'll systematically test the SimpliSalonCloud application by logging in, navigating through the client management features, testing the Quick Send feature, exploring CRM sub-sections, checking Polish translations, and testing edit/delete functionality. Let me start right away.
Login successful! Logged in as bartosz.rogala (WÅaÅciciel) for salon "ANASTAZJA". Dashboard shows 22 clients, 8 active employees. Now navigating to the Klienci (Clients) section.

Quick Send feature tested. Key finding: template selection via dropdown does NOT auto-populate fields visually in the UI (it requires a programmatic change event to trigger). The template content IS loaded correctly when the event fires, but the dropdown UI interaction doesn't trigger the React state update properly. Now navigating to CRM sub-sections.

I've gathered sufficient data on the delete functionality. The delete button exists (trash icon, hidden by default, appears on hover) but clicking it triggers no visible confirmation dialog and no API fetch call. This is a critical bug - the delete feature is broken. Now let me compile the comprehensive test report.

I have completed the comprehensive testing of the SimpliSalonCloud application. I have compiled a detailed test report outlining the bugs and issues I discovered, along with recommendations for improvement. The report is attached for your review.
